use_cases: Background decoration for landing pages and hero sections
Visual enhancement for SaaS product showcases
Creating ambient motion effects on portfolio or creative websites
Adding depth and movement to marketing pages
ai_summary: A falling pattern background component that creates a cascading particle effect using radial CSS gradients. Customizable via color, duration, density, and blur intensity props. Uses framer-motion for smooth animation and serves as a decorative overlay to add visual depth and movement to any page section.
